query:
UPDATE chat_runs
               SET input_path = $2,
                   output_path = $3,
                   meta_path = $4,
                   artifact_state = 'stub',
                   pruned_at = $5,
                   prune_reason = $6,
                   retention_summary_json = COALESCE($7, retention_summary_json)
               WHERE id = $1
